package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesCompareNotEqualZero() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_compare_not_equal_zero"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.Compare(...) != 0` instead of `!bytes.Equal(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
